ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "web_scraper_order" TEXT /* Order of the property in the web scraper output */,
  "web_scraper_start_url" TEXT /* Start URL used by the web scraper */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the property */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the property */,
  "beds" INTEGER /* Number of beds in the property */,
  "baths" REAL /* Number of baths in the property */,
  "sqft" INTEGER /* Square footage of the property */,
  "dom" TEXT /* Days on market (DOM) */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the property was built */,
  "lot_size" TEXT /* Size of the lot */,
  "estimate" REAL /* Estimated value of the property */,
  "est_monthly_payment" REAL /* Estimated monthly payment for the property */,
  "hoa_dues" REAL /* Home owner association (HOA) dues */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of the property (e.g., house, condo, townhouse) */,
  "neighborhood" TEXT /* Name of the neighborhood */,
  "city" TEXT /* City name */,
  "state" TEXT /* State name */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the property */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the property */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the property information was updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the property */,
  "image_urls" TEXT /* URLs of images of the property */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL of a video tour of the property */,
  "virtual_tour_url" TEXT /* URL of a virtual tour of the property */,
  "hoa_rules" TEXT /* Details of HOA rules and regulations */,
  "hoa_website" TEXT /* URL of the HOA website */,
  "taxes" REAL /* Annual property taxes */,
  "property_url" TEXT /* URL of the property listing on the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the agent */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the agent */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the agent */,
  "brokerage" TEXT /* Brokerage the agent belongs to */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the agent */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL of the agent's photo */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the agent */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience the agent has */,
  "ratings" REAL /* Average rating of the agent */,
  "reviews_count" INTEGER /* Number of reviews the agent has received */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the agent's personal website */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to the agent's social media profiles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brokers" (
  "broker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each broker */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the broker */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the broker */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the broker */,
  "brokerage" TEXT /* Brokerage the broker belongs to */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the broker */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL of the broker's photo */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the broker */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience the broker has */,
  "ratings" REAL /* Average rating of the broker */,
  "reviews_count" INTEGER /* Number of reviews the broker has received */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the broker's personal website */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to the broker's social media profiles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("broker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "listings" (
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each listing */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being listed */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent managing the listing */,
  "broker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the broker managing the listing */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the listing (e.g., active, pending, sold) */,
  "listing_date" TEXT /* Date the property was listed */,
  "listing_price" REAL /* Initial listing price */,
  "price_history" TEXT /* JSON array of price changes over time */,
  "open_house_dates" TEXT /* JSON array of open house dates */,
  "virtual_tour_url" TEXT /* URL of a virtual tour of the listing */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL of a video tour of the listing */,
  "views_count" INTEGER /* Number of views the listing has received */,
  "favorites_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the listing has been favorited */,
  "leads_count" INTEGER /* Number of leads generated from the listing */,
  "status_change_date" TEXT /* Date the listing status was last changed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("listing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_listings_broker_id FOREIGN KEY ("broker_id") REFERENCES brokers ("broker_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_listings_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_listings_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leads" (
  "lead_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lead */,
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the listing the lead is interested in */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact */,
  "lead_source" TEXT /* Source of the lead (e.g., website, referral, etc.) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the lead (e.g., new, contacted, interested, sold) */,
  "last_contact_date" TEXT /* Date of the last communication with the lead */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments about the lead */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lead_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leads_listing_id FOREIGN KEY ("listing_id") REFERENCES listings ("listing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "communications" (
  "communication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each communication */,
  "lead_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lead being communicated with */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent communicating with the lead */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message being sent */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the communication */,
  "communication_type" TEXT /* Type of communication (e.g., email, phone call, in-person meeting) */,
  "communication_status" TEXT /* Status of the communication (e.g., sent, received, read) */,
  "response_time" INTEGER /* Time taken to respond to the communication (in minutes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("communication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_communications_lead_id FOREIGN KEY ("lead_id") REFERENCES leads ("lead_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_communications_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the listing being tracked */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views for the listing */,
  "favorites" INTEGER /* Number of favorites for the listing */,
  "outs" INTEGER /* Number of outs for the listing */,
  "clicks" INTEGER /* Number of clicks the listing has received */,
  "conversions" INTEGER /* Number of conversions (e.g., leads, sales) from the listing */,
  "conversion_rate" REAL /* Conversion rate of the listing */,
  "average_time_on_page" REAL /* Average time a user spends on the listing page */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_listing_id FOREIGN KEY ("listing_id") REFERENCES listings ("listing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "district" TEXT /* District the school belongs to */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating of the school */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance from the property to the school */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the school */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the school */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the school's website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating of the district */,
  "area" TEXT /* Area covered by the district */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the district office */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the district office */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the district's website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "zoning" (
  "zoning_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each zoning entry */,
  "code" TEXT /* Code for the zoning */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the zoning */,
  "description_long" TEXT /* More detailed description of the zoning */,
  "rules" TEXT /* Rules and regulations associated with the zoning */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the zoning regulations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zoning_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parking" (
  "parking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parking entry */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property the parking belongs to */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of parking (e.g., attached, detached) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the parking */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the parking (e.g., number of spaces) */,
  "additional_info" TEXT /* Any additional information about the parking */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parking_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "amenities" (
  "amenity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each amenity entry */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property the amenity belongs to */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of amenity (e.g., pool, gym) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the amenity */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the amenity (e.g., number of people it can accommodate) */,
  "additional_info" TEXT /* Any additional information about the amenity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("amenity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_amenities_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "walk_scores" (
  "walk_score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each walk score entry */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property the walk score belongs to */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Walk score */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the walk score */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the walk score was last updated */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the walk score (e.g., Walk Score API) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("walk_score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_walk_scores_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transit_scores" (
  "transit_score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transit score entry */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property the transit score belongs to */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Transit score */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transit score */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the transit score was last updated */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the transit score (e.g., Walk Score API) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transit_score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transit_scores_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bike_scores" (
  "bike_score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bike score entry */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property the bike score belongs to */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Bike score */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the bike score */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the bike score was last updated */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the bike score (e.g., Walk Score API) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bike_score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bike_scores_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)
